title: dolichos luticola
intro: Dolichos luticola, also known as the swamp dolichos, is a type of perennial vine that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating skin conditions, wounds, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of dolichos luticola include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of dolichos luticola include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
